name: file-hosting-link-65ltv
anchor: F3.FL × F2.FH interaction at standard LTV (cross-axis sibling to B10/C04)
rationale: File-hosting link intake at standard 65% LTV. Both F3.FL classification AND F2.FH state-gate fire from same input. Tests interaction in the routing-control flow: F3.FL routes intake to admin-handoff handler; F2.FH marks Vienna paused per-deal. Sibling to B10 (F2.FH focus) and C04 (F3.FL focus); F20 asserts both.
notes: Single-event sequence. Cross-family interaction triangle: B10 + C04 + F20 fully characterize file-hosting-link handling.
